DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS DEFENDANT BRANDON CRUZ'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT. Appearances: Lindsay A. LaSalle of Morrison Foerster (268.6079) for cross defendant and moving party; Elizabeth Trent of Haight Brown & Bonesteel (310.215.7100) appearing telephonically for cross complainant Jack Nadal. Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: overruled, 10 days leave to answer. Issues raised are factual and not appropriate for demurrer. Ms. Trent to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
